test.fill_query: ALTER TABLE hits_10m_single ADD INDEX idx_sp_lazy(SearchPhrase) TYPE text(tokenizer = 'splitByNonAlpha', posting_list_codec = 'bitpacking')
ALTER TABLE hits_10m_single MATERIALIZE INDEX idx_sp_lazy
test.query: SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasAllTokens(SearchPhrase, ['the', 'market']) SETTINGS text_index_posting_list_apply_mode = 'materialize'
SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasAllTokens(SearchPhrase, ['the', 'market']) SETTINGS text_index_posting_list_apply_mode = 'lazy', allow_experimental_text_index_lazy_apply = 1
SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasAllTokens(SearchPhrase, ['the', 'video', 'world', 'market']) SETTINGS text_index_posting_list_apply_mode = 'materialize'

SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasAllTokens(SearchPhrase, ['the', 'video', 'world', 'market']) SETTINGS text_index_posting_list_apply_mode = 'lazy', allow_experimental_text_index_lazy_apply = 1
SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasToken(SearchPhrase, 'video') SETTINGS text_index_posting_list_apply_mode = 'materialize'
SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasToken(SearchPhrase, 'video') SETTINGS text_index_posting_list_apply_mode = 'lazy', allow_experimental_text_index_lazy_apply = 1
SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasAnyTokens(SearchPhrase, ['the', 'video', 'world', 'market']) SETTINGS text_index_posting_list_apply_mode = 'materialize'

SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasAnyTokens(SearchPhrase, ['the', 'video', 'world', 'market']) SETTINGS text_index_posting_list_apply_mode = 'lazy', allow_experimental_text_index_lazy_apply = 1
test.drop_query: ALTER TABLE hits_10m_single DROP INDEX idx_sp_lazy
